---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Agent Studio
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
